content.thinking: Let me start by inspecting the Ray cluster's current configuration using the provided kubectl commands and additional queries to gather comprehensive information for the audit report.

content.text: I'll gather all the cluster configuration data in parallel before writing the audit report.

input.command: kubectl -n ray get deploy ray-worker -o jsonpath='{.spec.replicas}' 2>&1
kubectl -n ray get deploy ray-head ray-worker -o jsonpath='{range .items[*]}{.metadata.name}{"="}{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].image}{"\n"}{end}' 2>&1
input.description: Get image versions for ray-head and ray-worker

input.command: kubectl -n ray get deploy ray-head ray-worker -o yaml | grep -A4 resources 2>&1

input.command: kubectl -n ray get deploy ray-head -o yaml 2>&1

content.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"Deployment","metadata":{"annotations":{},"labels":{"app.kubernetes.io/component":"head","app.kubernetes.io/name":"ray","bench.ray.cluster":"ray"},"name":"ray-head","namespace":"ray"},"spec":{"replicas":1,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app.kubernetes.io/component":"head","app.kubernetes.io/name":"ray","bench.ray.cluster":"ray"}},"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app.kubernetes.io/component":"head","app.kubernetes.io/name":"ray","bench.ray.cluster":"ray"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["sh","-c","ray start --head --node-ip-address=\"${MY_POD_IP}\" --port=6379 --include-dashboard=false --num-cpus=0 --block\n"],"env":[{"name":"MY_POD_IP","valueFrom":{"fieldRef":{"fieldPath":"status.podIP"}}},{"name":"RAY_NODE_ID","valueFrom":{"fieldRef":{"fieldPath":"metadata.uid"}}},{"name":"RAY_RAYLET_PID","value":"1"}],"image":"rayproject/ray:2.9.0","name":"ray-head","ports":[{"containerPort":6379,"name":"gcs"}]}]}}}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-26T05:11:29Z"
  generation: 1
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: head
    app.kubernetes.io/name: ray
    bench.ray.cluster: ray
  name: ray-head
  namespace: ray
  resourceVersion: "1235386"
  uid: be6196b6-2b43-40f2-b839-ad393eb169c4
spec:
  progressDeadlineSeconds: 600
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/component: head
      app.kubernetes.io/name: ray
      bench.ray.cluster: ray
  strategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 25%
      maxUnavailable: 25%
    type: RollingUpdate
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/component: head
        app.kubernetes.io/name: ray
        bench.ray.cluster: ray
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - sh
        - -c
        - |
          ray start --head --node-ip-address="${MY_POD_IP}" --port=6379 --include-dashboard=false --num-cpus=0 --block
        env:
        - name: MY_POD_IP
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              apiVersion: v1
              fieldPath: status.podIP
        - name: RAY_NODE_ID
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              apiVersion: v1
              fieldPath: metadata.uid
        - name: RAY_RAYLET_PID
          value: "1"
        image: rayproject/ray:2.9.0
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: ray-head
        ports:
        - containerPort: 6379
          name: gcs
          protocol: TCP
        resources: {}
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
status:
  availableReplicas: 1
  conditions:
  - lastTransitionTime: "2026-06-26T05:11:50Z"
    lastUpdateTime: "2026-06-26T05:11:50Z"
    message: Deployment has minimum availability.
    reason: MinimumReplicasAvailable
    status: "True"
    type: Available
  - lastTransitionTime: "2026-06-26T05:11:34Z"
    lastUpdateTime: "2026-06-26T05:11:50Z"
    message: ReplicaSet "ray-head-5c586c8fd6" has successfully progressed.
    reason: NewReplicaSetAvailable
    status: "True"
